welcome.tagline: Turn your food menu and wine list into a print-ready pairing menu, powered by Dionisus.ai
welcome.whyCard1: PairBuilder doesn't just create pairings: it turns your menu and wine list into a real sales tool, helping the restaurant showcase higher-margin bottles, improve stock rotation, and back up the sommelier with coherent, immediate suggestions ready for service.
welcome.whyCard2: Every pairing is built starting from your actual wine list and the venue's priorities, letting you highlight strategic labels, reduce stock, and offer guests a more curated experience without adding workload to the floor.
welcome.whyCard3: PairBuilder combines food-pairing logic with the restaurant's commercial strategy: it creates a print-ready pairing menu that helps the staff recommend wines better, makes it easier to showcase the cellar, and turns the wine list into a real upselling engine.
welcome.howDescription: PAIRBUILDER performs a molecular scan of your menu to identify ingredients and flavor profiles. Using Concordance and Contrast logic, it cross-references this data with your cellar to craft the perfect experience for your guests. You can also prioritize specific labels for strategic goals.

loading.title: Working the magic...
loading.subtitle: Dioniso is analyzing the flavors and notes of your drinks.

ecosystem.lead: Want to unlock the full Ambrosia ecosystem?

howItWorks.title: The Algorithm<1/><2>of Taste</2>
howItWorks.subtitle: PAIRBUILDER doesn't just read data. It interprets the soul of your menu to create sensory connections once reserved for the greatest Sommeliers.

molecularBalance.heading: Molecular Balance
molecularBalance.p1: Dionisus AI performs a <1>bio-aromatic scan</1>. Every ingredient is broken down into its chemical descriptors: fattiness, acidic tendency, savoriness, succulence and persistence.
molecularBalance.p2: At the same time, we de-structure your cellar by analyzing each label by body, tannins, alcohol and residual sugar. The algorithm isn't just matching by name — it calculates the <1>physical balance</1> between food and wine.

concordance.label: CONCORDANCE
concordance.description: The AI aligns the intensities. A structured dish calls for a full-bodied wine. A sweet dessert calls for a wine with more sugar.

contrast.label: CONTRAST
contrast.description: The AI cleanses the palate. The wine's savoriness offsets the fattiness of the food. Acidity cuts through richness, resetting the taste buds with every bite.

professionalOutput.heading: Professional Output
professionalOutput.paragraph: From theory to the table. The system instantly generates an <1>elegant PDF document</1> ready to be presented to your guests as a special insert to your menu.
professionalOutput.pill1: Change your menu in seconds, not hours.

priorityIntelligence.heading: Priority Intelligence
priorityIntelligence.p1: Your commercial goals are part of our code. With the <1>Priority Management</1> system, you can guide the AI.
priorityIntelligence.p2: By flagging your strategic bottles (new arrivals, overstock, or premium references), the algorithm will prioritize the best possible pairing among these picks.

cta.title: Want to automate the experience?
cta.description: PAIRBUILDER is the perfect tool for your printable pairings. But if you want an interactive <1>Digital Wine List</1> that sells itself, discover Ambrosiavino.
cta.tagline: The professional evolution of your beverage design

aboutUs.title: Dionisus<1/><2>AI Ecosystem</2>
aboutUs.subtitle: We are pioneers of Artificial Intelligence applied to the Food & Beverage world. We turn data into emotion, and service into operational excellence.

beyondCode.heading: Beyond Code
beyondCode.p1: The <1>Dionisus AI</1> ecosystem was born from the vision of uniting the ancient tradition of hospitality with the frontiers of evolved intelligence. We don't build mere software — we build digital collaborators that exponentially amplify professional capabilities.
beyondCode.p2: Our mission is to break down the barriers between technology and taste, making fine sommellerie accessible and scalable for every modern restaurant operation.

team.heading: Our Team
team.p1: We are a multidisciplinary group where <1>oenological excellence</1> meets <3>cutting-edge software development</3>.
team.p2: Our team is made up of <1>Oenologists</1> and engineers specialized in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, working in synergy to decode the language of taste into precise algorithms.

ecosystem.heading: Digital F&B DNA
ecosystem.ambrosiavinoDescription: The flagship of our ecosystem. Much more than a digital menu: <1>Ambrosiavino</1> is an intelligence tool that analyzes customer profiles and maximizes cellar rotation through predictive recommendation algorithms.
ecosystem.dionisusDescription: The technological core of the ecosystem. <1>Dionisus.ai</1> integrates real-time market analysis, intelligent cost management, and marketing automation tools designed specifically to scale modern restaurant success.
ecosystem.footer: Dionisus AI constantly monitors global F&B trends to develop tools that turn data complexity into ease of use and profit for the restaurateur.

contact.title: Let's<1/><2>Talk</2>
contact.subtitle: Got technical questions or want to integrate our technologies into your restaurant? We're here for that.

hq.heading: Headquarters
hq.description: The beating heart of Dionisus AI.<1/>Italian innovation for the global market.
